---
title: "leverkusen_spatial"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown


```{r cars}

library(StatsBombR)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsoccer)
library(readr)

```


```{r cars}


get_elo_on_date <- function(team, date) {
  date <- as.Date(date)
  
  url <- paste0("http://api.clubelo.com/", team)
  hist <- suppressWarnings(read_csv(url, show_col_types = FALSE))
  
  # ClubElo history typically has From/To date ranges per rating row.
  hist <- hist %>%
    mutate(
      From = as.Date(From),
      To   = as.Date(To)
    ) %>%
    arrange(From)
  
  # Find a row whose [From, To] interval contains the date
  in_range <- hist %>%
    filter((!is.na(From) & date >= From) & (is.na(To) | date <= To))
  
  if (nrow(in_range) >= 1) return(as.numeric(in_range$Elo[1]))
  
  # Fallback: last Elo before the date
  before <- hist %>% filter(!is.na(From) & From <= date)
  if (nrow(before) >= 1) return(as.numeric(before$Elo[nrow(before)]))
  
  NA_real_
}
```

```{r cars}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Get ALL matches from the target season
# ------------------------------------------------------------
comps <- FreeCompetitions() %>%
  filter(competition_id == 9, season_name == "2023/2024")

matches <- FreeMatches(comps)

# Keep only matches where Bayer Leverkusen played
leverkusen_matches <- matches %>%
  filter(
    home_team.home_team_name == "Bayer Leverkusen" |
      away_team.away_team_name == "Bayer Leverkusen"
  )


```

```{r cars}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Download ALL events for those matches (this may take minutes)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
cat("Downloading full-season event data...\n")
events_raw <- free_allevents(MatchesDF = leverkusen_matches)
events <- allclean(events_raw)  # includes cleaning/splitting locations etc. [web:2]


```

```{r cars}



# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Filter defensive actions: Pressures
#    (In StatsBomb data, event type is stored in type.name) [web:20]
# ------------------------------------------------------------
pressure_events <- events %>%
  filter(
    team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
    type.name == "Pressure",
    !is.na(location.x),
    !is.na(location.y)
  )

```


```{r cars}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Build match-level table: opponent + match date + ClubElo name
# ------------------------------------------------------------
match_info <- leverkusen_matches %>%
  mutate(
    opponent = ifelse(
      home_team.home_team_name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
      away_team.away_team_name,
      home_team.home_team_name
    ),
    match_date = as.Date(match_date),
    
    # StatsBomb team names -> ClubElo team names
    opponent_clubelo = case_when(
      opponent == "Bayern Munich" ~ "Bayern",
      opponent == "Borussia Dortmund" ~ "Dortmund",
      opponent == "RB Leipzig" ~ "RBLeipzig",
      opponent == "VfB Stuttgart" ~ "Stuttgart",
      opponent == "Eintracht Frankfurt" ~ "Frankfurt",
      opponent == "Borussia Mönchengladbach" ~ "Gladbach",
      opponent == "VfL Wolfsburg" ~ "Wolfsburg",
      opponent == "SC Freiburg" ~ "Freiburg",
      opponent == "FC Augsburg" ~ "Augsburg",
      opponent == "TSG Hoffenheim" ~ "Hoffenheim",
      opponent == "Werder Bremen" ~ "Werder",
      opponent == "FC Heidenheim" ~ "Heidenheim",
      opponent == "Darmstadt 98" ~ "Darmstadt",
      opponent == "FC Köln" ~ "Koeln",
      opponent == "FSV Mainz 05" ~ "Mainz",
      opponent == "VfL Bochum 1848" ~ "Bochum",
      TRUE ~ gsub(" ", "", opponent)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(match_id, match_date, opponent, opponent_clubelo)

```


```{r cars}



# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) Fetch opponent ELO on the match date
# ------------------------------------------------------------
cat("Fetching opponent ELO ratings...\n")
# Note: get_elo_on_date() must exist in your environment/package.
match_info <- match_info %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(opponent_elo = get_elo_on_date(opponent_clubelo, match_date)) %>%
  ungroup()

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

```



```{r cars}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5A) Compute fixed Bundesliga thresholds from an anchor date
# ------------------------------------------------------------
anchor_date <- as.Date("2023-08-18")  # pick the pre-MD1 anchor you want

# ClubElo "all teams by date" CSV API
# (returns Rank, Club, Country, Level, Elo, From, To)
clubelo_anchor <- readr::read_csv(
  paste0("http://api.clubelo.com/", format(anchor_date, "%Y-%m-%d")),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

bundesliga_anchor <- clubelo_anchor %>%
  filter(
    Country == "GER",
    Level == 1,
    as.Date(From) <= anchor_date,
    as.Date(To) >= anchor_date
  )

stopifnot(nrow(bundesliga_anchor) == 18)

elo_cut <- quantile(
  bundesliga_anchor$Elo,
  probs = c(1/3, 2/3),
  type = 7,        # R default; keep explicit
  na.rm = TRUE
)

p33 <- unname(elo_cut[[1]])
p67 <- unname(elo_cut[[2]])

cat("Bundesliga fixed thresholds (anchor =", as.character(anchor_date), "):\n")
cat("P33 =", round(p33, 2), " P67 =", round(p67, 2), "\n")

```



```{r cars}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Join ELO onto each pressure event + create ELO tier
# ------------------------------------------------------------
pressure_events_final <- pressure_events %>%
  left_join(match_info, by = "match_id") %>%
  mutate(
    elo_tier = case_when(
      is.na(opponent_elo) ~ "Unknown",
      opponent_elo < p33  ~ "Weak opponent",
      opponent_elo < p67  ~ "Mid opponent",
      TRUE                ~ "Top opponent"
    )
  )

pressure_events_final <- pressure_events_final %>%
  mutate(
    elo_tier = factor(elo_tier, levels = c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent"))
  )
```



```{r cars}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Heatmap: pressure density by opponent tier
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ggplot(pressure_events_final) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(x = location.x, y = location.y, fill = after_stat(ndensity)),
    geom = "raster", contour = FALSE, n = 200, h = c(15, 15)
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "magma", direction = -1, begin = 0.05,
    name = "Relative\nDensity"
  ) +
  # White mask so density does not appear outside the pitch boundaries
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0, fill = "white", color = NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 80, ymax = Inf, fill = "white", color = NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = 0, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = "white", color = NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 120, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = "white", color = NA) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_statsbomb, colour = "grey30", fill = NA) +
  theme_pitch() +  # from ggsoccer [web:15]
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 30, xend = 90, y = -5, yend = -5,
    colour = "grey30", linewidth = 1,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm"), type = "closed")
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 60, y = -9, label = "Attacking direction",
    colour = "grey30", size = 4, fontface = "italic"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-5, 125), ylim = c(-12, 85), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Bayer Leverkusen: Pressure Zones by Opponent Strength",
    subtitle = "Relative spatial density (normalized; faceted by opponent ELO tier)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, color = "white"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey20"),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ elo_tier, ncol = 3)

```





```{r cars}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) Match-level metrics + averages by opponent tier
# ------------------------------------------------------------
match_metrics <- pressure_events_final %>%
  group_by(match_id, elo_tier) %>%
  summarise(
    total_pressures = n(),
    dispersion_x = sd(location.x, na.rm = TRUE),
    dispersion_y = sd(location.y, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dispersion_analysis <- match_metrics %>%
  group_by(elo_tier) %>%
  summarise(
    matches_played = n(),
    pressures_per_match = round(mean(total_pressures), 1),
    dispersion_length_x = round(mean(dispersion_x), 1),
    dispersion_width_y = round(mean(dispersion_y), 1),
    area_dispersion_index = dispersion_length_x * dispersion_width_y,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pressures_per_match))

print(dispersion_analysis)

# Optional export:
# ggsave("Leverkusen_Pressure_Heatmap.png", width = 15, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)



```

```{r cars}

# ============================================================
# CHUNK 1: Geospatial Setup (sf geometry)
# ============================================================

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsoccer)

# ── StatsBomb coordinate system ──────────────────────────────
# Full pitch:     x ∈ [0, 120],  y ∈ [0, 80]
# Attacking box:  x ∈ [102, 120], y ∈ [18, 62]
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# 1a) Create the penalty box as an sf POLYGON
box_coords <- matrix(
  c(102, 18,
    120, 18,
    120, 62,
    102, 62,
    102, 18),   # close the ring
  ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE
)

penalty_box_sf <- st_polygon(list(box_coords)) %>%
  st_sfc(crs = NA_crs_)  # flat 2D, no geographic CRS needed

# 1b) Extract the BOUNDARY of the box (the four lines)
#     We only care about the LEFT edge (x = 102) — the "rule border"
#     But st_boundary() gives all four sides; st_distance() will
#     automatically find the shortest distance to ANY side, which
#     for events to the left of x=102 will always be the left edge.
penalty_box_boundary <- st_boundary(penalty_box_sf)

# 1c) (Optional) Extract ONLY the entry line (x = 102) explicitly
#     for cleaner visualisations later
entry_line_coords <- matrix(
  c(102, 18,
    102, 62),
  ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE
)
entry_line_sf <- st_linestring(entry_line_coords) %>%
  st_sfc(crs = NA_crs_)

# 1d) Quick sanity-check plot
ggplot() +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_statsbomb, colour = "grey40", fill = "white") +
  geom_sf(data = penalty_box_sf,
          fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.2,
          inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_sf(data = entry_line_sf,
          colour = "red", linewidth = 1.2,
          inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(80, 125), ylim = c(10, 70), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Penalty Box Geometry Check",
       subtitle = "Blue = box polygon | Red = RDD threshold line (x = 102)") +
  theme_pitch()

```

```{r cars}

# ============================================================
# CHUNK 2: Diagnostic — check what's in pressure_events_final
# ============================================================

# 2a) Shape and key columns
cat("Dimensions:", dim(pressure_events_final), "\n\n")

# 2b) All column names (so we can find duration + ball location fields)
cat("=== ALL COLUMN NAMES ===\n")
print(names(pressure_events_final))

# 2c) Focus on columns likely relevant to our outcome variables
#     StatsBomb typically has: duration, ball_receipt columns,
#     or counterpress fields. Let's check what's non-NA.
relevant_cols <- names(pressure_events_final)[
  grepl("duration|ball|pressure|location|counterpress|intensity",
        names(pressure_events_final), ignore.case = TRUE)
]

cat("\n=== POTENTIALLY RELEVANT COLUMNS ===\n")
print(relevant_cols)

# 2d) Sample values for those columns
cat("\n=== SAMPLE VALUES (first 5 rows) ===\n")
pressure_events_final %>%
  select(any_of(relevant_cols)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  glimpse()

# 2e) Check missingness in duration specifically
if ("duration" %in% names(pressure_events_final)) {
  cat("\nDuration — NAs:",
      sum(is.na(pressure_events_final$duration)),
      "out of", nrow(pressure_events_final), "\n")
  cat("Duration summary:\n")
  print(summary(pressure_events_final$duration))
}

```


```{r cars}

# ============================================================
# CHUNK 3: sf Points + Signed Distance to Penalty Box Line
# ============================================================

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsoccer)

# ── 3a) Convert pressure events to sf POINT object ───────────
pressure_sf <- pressure_events_final %>%
  filter(!is.na(location.x), !is.na(location.y)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("location.x", "location.y"), crs = NA_crs_, remove = FALSE)

cat("Total pressure events converted to sf:", nrow(pressure_sf), "\n")

# ── 3b) Compute raw (unsigned) distance to the box BOUNDARY ──
#    st_distance finds shortest distance to any side of the box
#    For events outside the box, this will be the left edge (x=102)
#    For events inside the box, this will also be the nearest edge

dist_matrix <- st_distance(pressure_sf, penalty_box_boundary)
pressure_sf$dist_to_boundary <- as.numeric(dist_matrix[, 1])

# ── 3c) Create SIGNED distance ────────────────────────────────
#    Convention:  Positive  = outside the box (x < 102)
#                 Negative  = inside the box  (x > 102)
#    This is the RDD "running variable" X

pressure_sf <- pressure_sf %>%
  mutate(
    inside_box = location.x > 102 & location.y > 18 & location.y < 62,
    dist_signed = ifelse(inside_box, -dist_to_boundary, dist_to_boundary)
  )

# ── 3d) CRITICAL CHECK: distribution of location.x ───────────
cat("\n=== location.x distribution ===\n")
print(summary(pressure_sf$location.x))

cat("\nEvents by zone:\n")
pressure_sf %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(zone = case_when(
    location.x < 60  ~ "Own half (x < 60)",
    location.x < 80  ~ "Mid third (60-80)",
    location.x < 102 ~ "Attacking third, outside box (80-102)",
    TRUE             ~ "Inside penalty box (x > 102)"
  )) %>%
  count(zone) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  print()

# ── 3e) Bandwidth filter: keep only events within 20m of line ─
#    This is the "local" comparison window for the RDD
BANDWIDTH <- 20  # metres — we'll let rdrobust optimise later

pressure_rdd <- pressure_sf %>%
  filter(abs(dist_signed) <= BANDWIDTH)

cat("\nEvents within", BANDWIDTH, "m bandwidth:", nrow(pressure_rdd), "\n")
cat("  Inside box: ", sum(pressure_rdd$inside_box), "\n")
cat("  Outside box:", sum(!pressure_rdd$inside_box), "\n")

# ── 3f) Build the two outcome variables ───────────────────────

# OUTCOME 1: Duration (already clean)
# OUTCOME 2: distance.ToD1.360 — if available, else distance.ToD1
if ("distance.ToD1.360" %in% names(pressure_rdd)) {
  pressure_rdd <- pressure_rdd %>%
    mutate(nearest_defender_dist = distance.ToD1.360)
  cat("\nUsing distance.ToD1.360 for Outcome 2\n")
} else if ("distance.ToD1" %in% names(pressure_rdd)) {
  pressure_rdd <- pressure_rdd %>%
    mutate(nearest_defender_dist = distance.ToD1)
  cat("\nUsing distance.ToD1 for Outcome 2\n")
} else {
  cat("\nWARNING: No distance.ToD1 column found. Outcome 2 will be skipped.\n")
}

cat("\nOutcome 2 (nearest_defender_dist) summary:\n")
print(summary(pressure_rdd$nearest_defender_dist))
cat("NAs in Outcome 2:", sum(is.na(pressure_rdd$nearest_defender_dist)), "\n")

# ── 3g) Quick spatial sanity check: plot events near the box ──
pressure_rdd %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = dist_signed, fill = inside_box)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "red", linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "steelblue", "TRUE" = "tomato"),
                    labels = c("Outside box", "Inside box"),
                    name = "") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Pressure Events Around the Penalty Box Line",
    subtitle = paste0("Within ±", BANDWIDTH, "m bandwidth | Red line = RDD threshold (x = 102)"),
    x = "Signed Distance to Penalty Box Line (m)\nPositive = outside | Negative = inside",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

```



```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 4A: Diagnose alternative Outcome 2 variables
# ============================================================

# Check the non-360 distance columns and other candidates
alt_cols <- c("distance.ToD1", "distance.ToD2", 
              "counterpress", "DefendersBehindBall",
              "AttackersBehindBall", "DefendersInCone",
              "density", "density.incone")

cat("=== Alternative Outcome 2 candidates (within bandwidth) ===\n")
for (col in alt_cols) {
  if (col %in% names(pressure_rdd)) {
    vals <- pressure_rdd %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% pull(!!col)
    n_valid <- sum(!is.na(vals))
    cat(sprintf("%-30s | valid: %4d / %4d | mean: %.3f\n",
                col, n_valid, nrow(pressure_rdd),
                ifelse(n_valid > 0, mean(vals, na.rm = TRUE), NA)))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("%-30s | NOT FOUND\n", col))
  }
}
```




```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 4B: Binned Scatter — the RDD "Money Shot"
# ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ── Parameters ───────────────────────────────────────────────
BIN_WIDTH <- 1.0   # 1-metre bins as per documentation spec

# ── Bin the running variable and compute mean duration ───────
binned_data <- pressure_rdd %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(
    dist_bin = floor(dist_signed / BIN_WIDTH) * BIN_WIDTH + BIN_WIDTH / 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(dist_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_duration    = mean(duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_duration      = sd(duration, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n                = n(),
    inside_box       = first(dist_bin) < 0,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n >= 5)  # drop bins with too few observations

# ── Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggplot(binned_data, aes(x = dist_bin, y = mean_duration, colour = inside_box)) +
  
  # Confidence ribbon
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_duration - 1.96 * se_duration,
                  ymax = mean_duration + 1.96 * se_duration,
                  fill  = inside_box),
              alpha = 0.15, colour = NA) +
  
  # Binned means
  geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.85) +
  
  # Separate local polynomial trend lines on each side
  geom_smooth(data = filter(binned_data, !inside_box),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.1, linetype = "solid") +
  geom_smooth(data = filter(binned_data, inside_box),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.1, linetype = "solid") +
  
  # RDD threshold line
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "black",
             linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.4, y = max(binned_data$mean_duration) * 0.97,
           label = "Penalty box\nboundary", hjust = 0,
           size = 3.5, colour = "black", fontface = "italic") +
  
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#2166ac", "TRUE" = "#d6604d"),
                      labels = c("Outside box", "Inside box"), name = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(  values = c("FALSE" = "#2166ac", "TRUE" = "#d6604d"),
                      guide  = "none") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 6), name = "Events\nper bin") +
  
  labs(
    title    = "RDD: Pressure Duration Around the Penalty Box Boundary",
    subtitle = "Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24 Bundesliga | Bins = 1m | Shaded = 95% CI",
    x        = "Signed Distance to Penalty Box Line (m)\n← Inside box  |  Outside box →",
    y        = "Mean Pressure Duration (seconds)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40"),
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```



```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 5: Formal RDD — rdrobust models
# ============================================================

# install.packages("rdrobust") # run once if needed
library(rdrobust)
library(dplyr)

rdd_data <- pressure_rdd %>% st_drop_geometry()

# ── 5a) Baseline model — full sample ─────────────────────────
#    Y = duration, X = dist_signed, cutoff = 0
#    D = 1 if inside box (X < 0)
#    rdrobust automatically selects optimal bandwidth (MSE)

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("MODEL 1: Baseline — All matches, Outcome = Duration\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

rdd_base <- rdrobust(
  y    = rdd_data$duration,
  x    = rdd_data$dist_signed,
  c    = 0,           # cutoff
  kernel = "triangular",  # standard in RDD literature
  bwselect = "mserd"  # MSE-optimal bandwidth, same on both sides
)
summary(rdd_base)

# ── 5b) Extract key numbers for reporting ────────────────────
cat("\n--- Key Estimates (Model 1) ---\n")
cat("Optimal bandwidth (h):", round(rdd_base$bws[1,1], 3), "metres\n")
cat("Observations in bandwidth — Left (inside):",
    rdd_base$N_h[1], "| Right (outside):", rdd_base$N_h[2], "\n")
cat("LATE estimate (beta):", round(rdd_base$coef[1], 4), "\n")
cat("p-value:             ", round(rdd_base$pv[1], 4), "\n")

# ── 5c) By ELO tier ──────────────────────────────────────────
tiers <- c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent")
rdd_by_tier <- list()

cat("\n=======================================================\n")
cat("MODEL 2: By ELO Tier — Outcome = Duration\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

for (tier in tiers) {
  tier_data <- rdd_data %>% filter(elo_tier == tier)
  
  cat("\n--- Tier:", tier, "(n =", nrow(tier_data), ") ---\n")
  
  if (nrow(tier_data) < 50) {
    cat("Too few observations, skipping.\n")
    next
  }
  
  tryCatch({
    fit <- rdrobust(
      y        = tier_data$duration,
      x        = tier_data$dist_signed,
      c        = 0,
      kernel   = "triangular",
      bwselect = "mserd"
    )
    rdd_by_tier[[tier]] <- fit
    
    cat("Bandwidth (h):", round(fit$bws[1,1], 3), "m\n")
    cat("N left/right: ", fit$N_h[1], "/", fit$N_h[2], "\n")
    cat("Beta (LATE):  ", round(fit$coef[1], 4), "\n")
    cat("p-value:      ", round(fit$pv[1],  4), "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Model failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

# ── 5d) Coefficient comparison table ─────────────────────────
cat("\n=======================================================\n")
cat("SUMMARY: Beta coefficients by ELO tier\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

results_table <- tibble(
  tier      = c("All matches", tiers),
  beta      = c(
    rdd_base$coef[1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t) {
      if (!is.null(rdd_by_tier[[t]])) rdd_by_tier[[t]]$coef[1] else NA_real_
    })
  ),
  pval      = c(
    rdd_base$pv[1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t) {
      if (!is.null(rdd_by_tier[[t]])) rdd_by_tier[[t]]$pv[1] else NA_real_
    })
  ),
  bw        = c(
    rdd_base$bws[1,1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t) {
      if (!is.null(rdd_by_tier[[t]])) rdd_by_tier[[t]]$bws[1,1] else NA_real_
    })
  ),
  n_inside  = c(
    rdd_base$N_h[1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t) {
      if (!is.null(rdd_by_tier[[t]])) rdd_by_tier[[t]]$N_h[1] else NA_real_
    })
  ),
  n_outside = c(
    rdd_base$N_h[2],
    sapply(tiers, function(t) {
      if (!is.null(rdd_by_tier[[t]])) rdd_by_tier[[t]]$N_h[2] else NA_real_
    })
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    significant = ifelse(pval < 0.05, "✓", ""),
    across(c(beta, pval, bw), ~ round(.x, 3))
  )

print(results_table)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 6: Clean dataset for Pressing Traps analysis
# ============================================================

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsoccer)

# ── 6a) Fix counterpress: StatsBomb convention NA = FALSE ─────
press_clean <- pressure_events_final %>%
  filter(!is.na(location.x), !is.na(location.y)) %>%
  mutate(
    # Binary outcome: did this press trigger an immediate recovery?
    counterpress_flag = ifelse(is.na(counterpress), FALSE, TRUE),
    
    # Spatial zone labels (7-zone grid — standard in football analytics)
    # Zones follow the "third + channel" convention
    third = case_when(
      location.x <  40 ~ "Defensive Third",
      location.x <  80 ~ "Middle Third",
      TRUE             ~ "Attacking Third"
    ),
    channel = case_when(
      location.y < 26.7 ~ "Left Channel",
      location.y < 53.3 ~ "Central Channel",
      TRUE              ~ "Right Channel"
    ),
    zone = paste(third, channel, sep = " — "),
    
    # Compact 6-zone version for modelling (drop defensive third — rare presses)
    zone6 = case_when(
      location.x <  40 ~ "D3",           # Defensive third (any channel)
      location.x <  80 & location.y < 26.7 ~ "M3_L",
      location.x <  80 & location.y < 53.3 ~ "M3_C",
      location.x <  80                     ~ "M3_R",
      location.x >= 80 & location.y < 26.7 ~ "A3_L",
      location.x >= 80 & location.y < 53.3 ~ "A3_C",
      TRUE                                  ~ "A3_R"
    ),
    zone6 = factor(zone6,
                   levels = c("D3","M3_L","M3_C","M3_R",
                              "A3_L","A3_C","A3_R"))
  )

# ── 6b) Convert to sf points ──────────────────────────────────
press_sf <- press_clean %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("location.x", "location.y"),
           crs = NA_crs_, remove = FALSE)

# ── 6c) Summary statistics ────────────────────────────────────
cat("=== Full Dataset ===\n")
cat("Total press events:", nrow(press_clean), "\n")
cat("Counterpress events:", sum(press_clean$counterpress_flag), "\n")
cat("Baseline counterpress rate:",
    round(mean(press_clean$counterpress_flag) * 100, 1), "%\n")

cat("\n=== Counterpress rate by Zone ===\n")
press_clean %>%
  group_by(zone6) %>%
  summarise(
    n_presses       = n(),
    n_counterpress  = sum(counterpress_flag),
    cp_rate         = round(mean(counterpress_flag) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(cp_rate)) %>%
  print()

cat("\n=== Counterpress rate by ELO tier ===\n")
press_clean %>%
  group_by(elo_tier) %>%
  summarise(
    n_presses      = n(),
    n_counterpress = sum(counterpress_flag),
    cp_rate        = round(mean(counterpress_flag) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()

cat("\n=== Counterpress rate by Zone × ELO tier ===\n")
press_clean %>%
  filter(zone6 != "D3") %>%   # too few observations in defensive third
  group_by(zone6, elo_tier) %>%
  summarise(
    n   = n(),
    cp_rate = round(mean(counterpress_flag) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = elo_tier, values_from = c(n, cp_rate)) %>%
  print()

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 7: KDE Maps — Press density vs Counterpress density
# ============================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(ggsoccer)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)  # install.packages("patchwork") if needed

# ── 7a) Separate ALL presses from TRAP presses ────────────────
press_all <- press_clean
press_cp  <- press_clean %>% filter(counterpress_flag == TRUE)

# ── 7b) Helper: build one KDE heatmap layer ──────────────────
make_kde_map <- function(data, title, subtitle,
                         fill_col = "magma", cap_label = "CP Density") {
  ggplot(data) +
    stat_density_2d(
      aes(x = location.x, y = location.y, fill = after_stat(ndensity)),
      geom = "raster", contour = FALSE, n = 200, h = c(12, 12)
    ) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      option = fill_col, direction = -1, begin = 0.05,
      name = cap_label, limits = c(0, 1)
    ) +
    # Mask outside pitch boundaries
    annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf, xmax=Inf, ymin=-Inf, ymax=0,   fill="white", color=NA) +
    annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf, xmax=Inf, ymin=80,   ymax=Inf, fill="white", color=NA) +
    annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf, xmax=0,   ymin=-Inf, ymax=Inf, fill="white", color=NA) +
    annotate("rect", xmin=120,  xmax=Inf, ymin=-Inf, ymax=Inf, fill="white", color=NA) +
    annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_statsbomb,
                   colour = "grey30", fill = NA) +
    # Zone grid lines
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(40, 80), colour = "white",
               linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(26.7, 53.3), colour = "white",
               linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
    coord_fixed(xlim = c(-2, 122), ylim = c(-5, 83), expand = FALSE) +
    labs(title = title, subtitle = subtitle) +
    theme_pitch() +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10,  hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40"),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
}

# ── 7c) Map 1: All presses (baseline density) ─────────────────
map_all <- make_kde_map(
  press_all,
  title    = "A) All Pressing Events",
  subtitle = "Spatial density — where Leverkusen press",
  fill_col = "Blues",
  cap_label = "Press\nDensity"
)

# ── 7d) Map 2: Counterpress events only (trap density) ────────
map_cp <- make_kde_map(
  press_cp,
  title    = "B) Counterpress Events (Traps Triggered)",
  subtitle = "Spatial density — where presses win the ball back",
  fill_col = "magma",
  cap_label = "Trap\nDensity"
)

# ── 7e) Map 3-5: Counterpress density by ELO tier ─────────────
tier_maps <- lapply(
  c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent"),
  function(tier) {
    d <- press_cp %>% filter(elo_tier == tier)
    n <- nrow(d)
    make_kde_map(
      d,
      title    = paste0("Trap Zones vs ", tier),
      subtitle = paste0("n = ", n, " counterpress events"),
      fill_col = "magma",
      cap_label = "Trap\nDensity"
    )
  }
)

# ── 7f) Compose final figures ─────────────────────────────────

# Figure 1: Side-by-side press vs trap density
fig1 <- map_all + map_cp +
  plot_annotation(
    title   = "Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24: Press Density vs Trap Density",
    subtitle = "Left: where they press | Right: where they win the ball",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40")
    )
  )

# Figure 2: Trap zones by ELO tier
fig2 <- tier_maps[[1]] + tier_maps[[2]] + tier_maps[[3]] +
  plot_layout(ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Bayer Leverkusen: Trap Zone Geography by Opponent Quality",
    subtitle = "Counterpress event density — does the trap shift against stronger teams?",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40")
    )
  )
ggsave("fig1_press_vs_trap_density.png", plot = fig1, width = 14, height = 6,  dpi = 300)
ggsave("fig2_trap_zones_by_elo.png",     plot = fig2, width = 18, height = 6.5, dpi = 300)

print(fig1)
print(fig2)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 8: Formal Vector Geometry — Zone Polygons + st_join
# ============================================================

library(sf)
library(dplyr)

# ── 8a) Build zone polygons formally with st_polygon() ───────
# Pitch: x ∈ [0,120], y ∈ [0,80]
# Thirds: D3 x<40, M3 40-80, A3 x>80
# Channels: Left y<26.7, Central 26.7-53.3, Right y>53.3

make_zone_polygon <- function(xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, name) {
  coords <- matrix(
    c(xmin, ymin,
      xmax, ymin,
      xmax, ymax,
      xmin, ymax,
      xmin, ymin),
    ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE
  )
  st_sf(
    zone6    = name,
    geometry = st_sfc(st_polygon(list(coords)), crs = NA_crs_)
  )
}

# Create all 7 zones
zone_polygons <- bind_rows(
  make_zone_polygon(  0,  40,  0, 80, "D3"),
  make_zone_polygon( 40,  80,  0, 26.7, "M3_L"),
  make_zone_polygon( 40,  80, 26.7, 53.3, "M3_C"),
  make_zone_polygon( 40,  80, 53.3, 80, "M3_R"),
  make_zone_polygon( 80, 120,  0, 26.7, "A3_L"),
  make_zone_polygon( 80, 120, 26.7, 53.3, "A3_C"),
  make_zone_polygon( 80, 120, 53.3, 80, "A3_R")
)

# ── 8b) Formal spatial join: assign zone to each press event ──
press_sf_joined <- press_sf %>%
  st_join(zone_polygons, join = st_intersects, suffix = c("_orig", "_spatial"))

# Verify spatial join matches case_when zone assignment
cat("=== Spatial join verification ===\n")
cat("Events successfully assigned a zone:",
    sum(!is.na(press_sf_joined$zone6_spatial)), "\n")
cat("Events on zone boundary (NA):",
    sum(is.na(press_sf_joined$zone6_spatial)), "\n")

# Cross-check with original zone6 from case_when
check <- press_sf_joined %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(match = zone6_orig == zone6_spatial) %>%
  summarise(
    total       = n(),
    matching    = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    mismatch    = sum(!match, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_match   = round(mean(match, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1)
  )
cat("\nZone assignment agreement (spatial vs case_when):\n")
print(check)

# Use spatial zone as the definitive assignment
press_sf_joined <- press_sf_joined %>%
  mutate(zone6 = zone6_spatial) %>%
  select(-zone6_orig, -zone6_spatial)

# ── 8c) Visualise zone polygons ───────────────────────────────
zone_labels <- zone_polygons %>%
  st_centroid() %>%
  mutate(
    x = st_coordinates(.)[,1],
    y = st_coordinates(.)[,2]
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

ggplot() +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_statsbomb,
                 colour = "grey40", fill = "white") +
  geom_sf(data = zone_polygons,
          aes(fill = zone6), alpha = 0.3,
          colour = "grey20", linewidth = 0.6,
          inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = zone_labels,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = zone6),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold", colour = "grey20") +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-2, 122), ylim = c(-3, 83), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2", guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title    = "Formal Zone Geometry (st_polygon)",
    subtitle = "7 zones built as sf polygons — press events assigned via st_intersects"
  ) +
  theme_pitch() +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 9: Raster Operations with terra
# ============================================================

# install.packages("terra") if needed
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsoccer)

# ── 9a) Create a blank raster over the pitch ─────────────────
# Resolution: 1x1 metre cells over the 120x80 pitch
pitch_raster <- rast(
  xmin = 0, xmax = 120,
  ymin = 0, ymax = 80,
  resolution = 1,   # 1 metre per cell
  crs = ""          # flat 2D, no geographic CRS
)

cat("Raster dimensions:", dim(pitch_raster), "\n")
cat("Number of cells:  ", ncell(pitch_raster), "\n")

# ── 9b) Rasterize press events — TWO layers ───────────────────
# Layer 1: Press count per cell (all presses)
# Layer 2: Counterpress count per cell (trap triggers only)

press_coords <- press_sf_joined %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(location.x, location.y, counterpress_flag)

# Convert to SpatVector for terra
press_vect <- vect(
  press_coords,
  geom  = c("location.x", "location.y"),
  crs   = ""
)

# Rasterize: count of ALL press events per cell
rast_press <- rasterize(press_vect, pitch_raster, fun = "count")
names(rast_press) <- "press_count"

# Rasterize: count of COUNTERPRESS events per cell
press_cp_vect <- vect(
  press_coords %>% filter(counterpress_flag == TRUE),
  geom = c("location.x", "location.y"),
  crs  = ""
)
rast_cp <- rasterize(press_cp_vect, pitch_raster, fun = "count")
names(rast_cp) <- "cp_count"

# ── 9c) Derive trap rate raster ───────────────────────────────
# Trap Rate = counterpress / press (per cell)
# Replace 0s with NA to avoid division noise in empty cells

rast_press_safe <- classify(rast_press, cbind(0, NA))
rast_rate       <- rast_cp / rast_press_safe
names(rast_rate) <- "trap_rate"

cat("\nTrap rate raster summary:\n")
print(summary(values(rast_rate), na.rm = TRUE))

# ── 9d) Smooth the trap rate with a focal (moving window) ─────
# 5x5 cell focal mean = spatial smoothing, equivalent to local average
rast_rate_smooth <- focal(rast_rate, w = 5, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)
names(rast_rate_smooth) <- "trap_rate_smooth"

# ── 9e) ZONAL STATISTICS ──────────────────────────────────────
# This is the key vector-raster operation:
# For each zone polygon, extract mean trap rate from the raster

# Convert zone polygons to SpatVector
zone_vect <- vect(zone_polygons)

# Zonal statistics: mean trap rate per zone
zonal_stats <- zonal(rast_rate_smooth, zone_vect, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)
zonal_stats$zone6 <- zone_polygons$zone6

cat("\n=== Zonal Statistics: Mean Trap Rate per Zone ===\n")
zonal_stats %>%
  arrange(desc(trap_rate_smooth)) %>%
  mutate(trap_rate_pct = round(trap_rate_smooth * 100, 1)) %>%
  select(zone6, trap_rate_pct) %>%
  print()

# ── 9f) Join zonal stats back to zone polygons for mapping ────
zone_polygons_stats <- zone_polygons %>%
  left_join(zonal_stats, by = "zone6") %>%
  mutate(trap_rate_pct = round(trap_rate_smooth * 100, 1))

# ── 9g) Figure 3: Trap Rate Choropleth (vector over raster) ───
# Convert smoothed raster to data frame for ggplot
rast_df <- as.data.frame(rast_rate_smooth, xy = TRUE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(trap_rate_smooth))

# Zone centroids for labels
zone_centroids <- zone_polygons_stats %>%
  st_centroid() %>%
  mutate(
    cx    = st_coordinates(.)[,1],
    cy    = st_coordinates(.)[,2],
    label = paste0(zone6, "\n", trap_rate_pct, "%")
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

fig3 <- ggplot() +
  # Raster layer: smoothed trap rate surface
  geom_raster(data = rast_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y, fill = trap_rate_smooth)) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette  = "RdYlGn", direction = 1,
    name     = "Trap Rate\n(smoothed)",
    limits   = c(0, 0.6),
    labels   = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  # Vector layer: zone polygon borders
  geom_sf(data = zone_polygons_stats,
          fill = NA, colour = "white",
          linewidth = 1.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # Zone labels with zonal mean
  geom_text(data = zone_centroids,
            aes(x = cx, y = cy, label = label),
            colour = "white", fontface = "bold",
            size = 4, lineheight = 0.9) +
  # Pitch overlay
  annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf,xmax=Inf,ymin=-Inf,ymax=0,   fill="white",color=NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf,xmax=Inf,ymin=80,  ymax=Inf, fill="white",color=NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf,xmax=0,  ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf, fill="white",color=NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=120, xmax=Inf,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf, fill="white",color=NA) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_statsbomb,
                 colour = "grey90", fill = NA) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-2,122), ylim = c(-3,83), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title    = "Leverkusen Pressing Trap Rate: Raster Surface + Zonal Statistics",
    subtitle = "Cell-level trap rate (smoothed, 5m focal window) | Zone means via terra::zonal()"
  ) +
  theme_pitch() +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40"),
    legend.position  = "right",
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

print(fig3)
ggsave("fig3_trap_rate_raster_zonal.png", plot = fig3,
       width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 10: Diagnostic — defensive actions in full events
# ============================================================

# ── 10a) Check event types available ─────────────────────────
cat("=== All event types in full season data ===\n")
events %>%
  count(type.name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print(n = 40)

# ── 10b) Filter defensive actions specifically ────────────────
defensive_types <- c("Tackle", "Duel", "Foul Committed",
                     "Block", "Interception", "Clearance")

cat("\n=== Defensive event counts (Leverkusen only) ===\n")
events %>%
  filter(
    team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
    type.name %in% defensive_types,
    !is.na(location.x),
    !is.na(location.y)
  ) %>%
  count(type.name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print()

# ── 10c) Inspect duel subtypes ────────────────────────────────
cat("\n=== Duel subtypes ===\n")
events %>%
  filter(team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
         type.name == "Duel") %>%
  count(duel.type.name, duel.outcome.name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print(n = 30)

# ── 10d) Inspect tackle structure if it exists separately ─────
cat("\n=== Tackle events (if separate type) ===\n")
events %>%
  filter(team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
         type.name == "Tackle") %>%
  glimpse()

# ── 10e) Spatial distribution check ──────────────────────────
# How many duel/tackle events fall near the penalty box?
cat("\n=== Defensive duels near penalty box (x > 80) ===\n")
events %>%
  filter(
    team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
    type.name %in% c("Duel", "Tackle", "Foul Committed"),
    !is.na(location.x),
    location.x > 80
  ) %>%
  count(type.name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print()

# ── 10f) Check x distribution of all defensive duels ─────────
cat("\n=== location.x summary for defensive duels ===\n")
events %>%
  filter(
    team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
    type.name == "Duel",
    !is.na(location.x)
  ) %>%
  pull(location.x) %>%
  summary() %>%
  print()
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# FIX: Rebuild match_info with elo_tier before Chunk 11
# ============================================================

match_info <- match_info %>%
  mutate(
    elo_tier = case_when(
      is.na(opponent_elo)    ~ "Unknown",
      opponent_elo < p33     ~ "Weak opponent",
      opponent_elo < p67     ~ "Mid opponent",
      TRUE                   ~ "Top opponent"
    ),
    elo_tier = factor(elo_tier,
                      levels = c("Top opponent","Mid opponent","Weak opponent"))
  )

# ============================================================
# CHUNK 11: Defensive Tackle RDD — own penalty box at x = 18
# ============================================================

library(sf)
library(dplyr)

# ── 11a) Join match info + ELO to full events ─────────────────
events_enriched <- events %>%
  left_join(
    match_info %>% select(match_id, match_date, opponent,
                          opponent_elo, elo_tier),
    by = "match_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    elo_tier = factor(elo_tier,
                      levels = c("Top opponent","Mid opponent","Weak opponent"))
  )

# ── 11b) Build defensive action dataset ───────────────────────
defensive_duels <- events_enriched %>%
  filter(
    team.name    == "Bayer Leverkusen",
    type.name    == "Duel",
    !is.na(duel.type.name),
    !is.na(location.x),
    !is.na(location.y)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    is_tackle        = duel.type.name == "Tackle",
    tackle_won       = duel.type.name == "Tackle" &
                       duel.outcome.name %in% c("Won","Success In Play","Success Out"),
    inside_own_box   = location.x < 18 &
                       location.y > 18 & location.y < 62,
    dist_signed_def  = location.x - 18
  )

cat("=== Defensive Duel Dataset ===\n")
cat("Total defensive duels:", nrow(defensive_duels), "\n")
cat("Tackle attempts:      ", sum(defensive_duels$is_tackle), "\n")
cat("Aerial duels:         ", sum(!defensive_duels$is_tackle), "\n")
cat("Inside own box:       ", sum(defensive_duels$inside_own_box), "\n")

# ── 11c) Distribution around the box line ─────────────────────
cat("\n=== Duels by distance to own box line ===\n")
defensive_duels %>%
  mutate(zone_def = case_when(
    dist_signed_def < -5   ~ "Deep in own box (< -5m)",
    dist_signed_def < 0    ~ "Just inside box (0 to -5m)",
    dist_signed_def < 5    ~ "Just outside box (0 to 5m)",
    dist_signed_def < 15   ~ "Near box (5-15m)",
    TRUE                   ~ "Far from box (>15m)"
  )) %>%
  count(zone_def, is_tackle) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from  = is_tackle,
                     values_from = n,
                     names_prefix = "tackle_") %>%
  rename(aerial = `tackle_FALSE`, tackle = `tackle_TRUE`) %>%
  mutate(
    total       = aerial + tackle,
    tackle_rate = round(100 * tackle / total, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(zone_def, levels = c(
    "Deep in own box (< -5m)", "Just inside box (0 to -5m)",
    "Just outside box (0 to 5m)", "Near box (5-15m)", "Far from box (>15m)"
  ))) %>%
  print()

# ── 11d) Bandwidth filter for RDD ─────────────────────────────
BANDWIDTH_DEF <- 20

rdd_def <- defensive_duels %>%
  filter(abs(dist_signed_def) <= BANDWIDTH_DEF)

cat("\n=== RDD Sample (±", BANDWIDTH_DEF, "m from x=18) ===\n")
cat("Total events:  ", nrow(rdd_def), "\n")
cat("Inside box:    ", sum(rdd_def$inside_own_box), "\n")
cat("Outside box:   ", sum(!rdd_def$inside_own_box), "\n")
cat("Tackle rate inside: ",
    round(100 * mean(rdd_def$is_tackle[rdd_def$inside_own_box]), 1), "%\n")
cat("Tackle rate outside:",
    round(100 * mean(rdd_def$is_tackle[!rdd_def$inside_own_box]), 1), "%\n")

# ── 11e) Convert to sf + compute distance to box geometry ─────
own_box_coords <- matrix(
  c(0, 18, 18, 18, 18, 62, 0, 62, 0, 18),
  ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE
)
own_box_sf       <- st_sfc(st_polygon(list(own_box_coords)), crs = NA_crs_)
own_box_boundary <- st_boundary(own_box_sf)

rdd_def_sf <- rdd_def %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("location.x","location.y"),
           crs = NA_crs_, remove = FALSE)

cat("\n=== Own box geometry check ===\n")
cat("Events inside box via sf:",
    sum(lengths(st_intersects(rdd_def_sf, own_box_sf)) > 0), "\n")

# ── 11f) Distribution histogram ───────────────────────────────
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(rdd_def, aes(x = dist_signed_def, fill = inside_own_box)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "red",
             linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "steelblue", "TRUE" = "tomato"),
    labels = c("Outside own box", "Inside own box"),
    name   = ""
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Defensive Duels Around Leverkusen's Own Penalty Box Line",
    subtitle = paste0("±", BANDWIDTH_DEF,
                      "m bandwidth | Red = RDD threshold (x = 18)"),
    x = "Signed Distance to Own Box Line (m)\nNegative = inside | Positive = outside",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 12: Formal RDD — rdrobust on tackle probability
# ============================================================

library(rdrobust)
library(dplyr)

rdd_data_def <- rdd_def  # from Chunk 11

# ── 12a) Baseline model ───────────────────────────────────────
# Y = is_tackle (binary: 1 = tackle attempted, 0 = aerial)
# X = dist_signed_def (positive = outside, negative = inside)
# Cutoff = 0 (the x=18 box line)
# Treatment D = 1 if inside box (X < 0) → expect negative beta

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("MODEL 1: Baseline — All matches, Y = P(Tackle)\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

rdd_base_def <- rdrobust(
  y        = as.numeric(rdd_data_def$is_tackle),
  x        = rdd_data_def$dist_signed_def,
  c        = 0,
  kernel   = "triangular",
  bwselect = "mserd"
)
summary(rdd_base_def)

cat("\n--- Key Estimates (Model 1) ---\n")
cat("Optimal bandwidth (h):", round(rdd_base_def$bws[1,1], 3), "metres\n")
cat("N inside bandwidth  — Left (inside box):",
    rdd_base_def$N_h[1], "| Right (outside):", rdd_base_def$N_h[2], "\n")
cat("LATE estimate (beta):", round(rdd_base_def$coef[1], 4), "\n")
cat("p-value:             ", round(rdd_base_def$pv[1],  4), "\n")

# ── 12b) By ELO tier ──────────────────────────────────────────
tiers <- c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent")
rdd_tier_def <- list()

cat("\n=======================================================\n")
cat("MODEL 2: By ELO Tier — Y = P(Tackle)\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

for (tier in tiers) {
  tier_data <- rdd_data_def %>% filter(elo_tier == tier)
  cat("\n--- Tier:", tier, "(n =", nrow(tier_data), ") ---\n")

  if (nrow(tier_data) < 40) {
    cat("Too few observations, skipping.\n")
    next
  }

  tryCatch({
    fit <- rdrobust(
      y        = as.numeric(tier_data$is_tackle),
      x        = tier_data$dist_signed_def,
      c        = 0,
      kernel   = "triangular",
      bwselect = "mserd"
    )
    rdd_tier_def[[tier]] <- fit
    cat("Bandwidth (h):", round(fit$bws[1,1], 3), "m\n")
    cat("N left/right: ", fit$N_h[1], "/", fit$N_h[2], "\n")
    cat("Beta (LATE):  ", round(fit$coef[1], 4), "\n")
    cat("p-value:      ", round(fit$pv[1],  4), "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Model failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

# ── 12c) Summary table ────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n=======================================================\n")
cat("SUMMARY: Penalty Tax by ELO Tier\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

results_def <- tibble(
  tier     = c("All matches", tiers),
  beta     = c(
    rdd_base_def$coef[1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t)
      if (!is.null(rdd_tier_def[[t]])) rdd_tier_def[[t]]$coef[1] else NA_real_)
  ),
  pval     = c(
    rdd_base_def$pv[1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t)
      if (!is.null(rdd_tier_def[[t]])) rdd_tier_def[[t]]$pv[1] else NA_real_)
  ),
  bw       = c(
    rdd_base_def$bws[1,1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t)
      if (!is.null(rdd_tier_def[[t]])) rdd_tier_def[[t]]$bws[1,1] else NA_real_)
  ),
  n_inside = c(
    rdd_base_def$N_h[1],
    sapply(tiers, function(t)
      if (!is.null(rdd_tier_def[[t]])) rdd_tier_def[[t]]$N_h[1] else NA_real_)
  ),
  n_outside = c(
    rdd_base_def$N_h[2],
    sapply(tiers, function(t)
      if (!is.null(rdd_tier_def[[t]])) rdd_tier_def[[t]]$N_h[2] else NA_real_)
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    significant = case_when(
      pval < 0.01 ~ "***",
      pval < 0.05 ~ "**",
      pval < 0.10 ~ "*",
      TRUE        ~ ""
    ),
    across(c(beta, pval, bw), ~ round(.x, 3))
  )

print(results_def)

# ── 12d) Binned scatter — the money shot ─────────────────────
BIN_WIDTH <- 1.5

binned_def <- rdd_data_def %>%
  mutate(
    dist_bin = floor(dist_signed_def / BIN_WIDTH) * BIN_WIDTH + BIN_WIDTH / 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(dist_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    tackle_rate = mean(is_tackle, na.rm = TRUE),
    se          = sd(is_tackle, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n           = n(),
    inside      = first(dist_bin) < 0,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n >= 5)

ggplot(binned_def, aes(x = dist_bin, y = tackle_rate, colour = inside)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = tackle_rate - 1.96 * se,
                  ymax = tackle_rate + 1.96 * se,
                  fill  = inside),
              alpha = 0.15, colour = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(data = filter(binned_def, !inside),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_smooth(data = filter(binned_def, inside),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "black",
             linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5,
           y = max(binned_def$tackle_rate) * 0.97,
           label = "Own penalty\nbox line",
           hjust = 0, size = 3.5,
           colour = "black", fontface = "italic") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#2166ac","TRUE" = "#d6604d"),
                      labels = c("Outside box","Inside box"), name = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(  values = c("FALSE" = "#2166ac","TRUE" = "#d6604d"),
                      guide  = "none") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 6), name = "Events\nper bin") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title    = "RDD: Penalty Tax on Defensive Tackling",
    subtitle = "Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24 | P(Tackle) drops sharply inside own box",
    x        = "Signed Distance to Own Box Line (m)\n← Inside box  |  Outside box →",
    y        = "Probability of Tackle Attempt"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40"),
    legend.position  = "top",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("fig4_rdd_tackle_binned_scatter.png",
       width = 10, height = 6.5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 13: Robustness checks + coefficient visualisation
# ============================================================

library(rdrobust)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# ── 13a) Mass points correction ───────────────────────────────
cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("ROBUSTNESS: Mass points adjustment — All matches\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

rdd_robust <- rdrobust(
  y           = as.numeric(rdd_data_def$is_tackle),
  x           = rdd_data_def$dist_signed_def,
  c           = 0,
  kernel      = "triangular",
  bwselect    = "mserd",
  masspoints  = "adjust"   # corrects for discrete running variable
)
summary(rdd_robust)

# ── 13b) Mass points correction by ELO tier ───────────────────
cat("\n=== Mass-adjusted models by tier ===\n")
rdd_robust_tiers <- list()

for (tier in c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent")) {
  tier_data <- rdd_data_def %>% filter(elo_tier == tier)
  if (nrow(tier_data) < 40) next
  tryCatch({
    fit <- rdrobust(
      y          = as.numeric(tier_data$is_tackle),
      x          = tier_data$dist_signed_def,
      c          = 0,
      kernel     = "triangular",
      bwselect   = "mserd",
      masspoints = "adjust"
    )
    rdd_robust_tiers[[tier]] <- fit
    cat(sprintf("\n%s: beta = %.3f, p = %.3f, h = %.2fm\n",
                tier,
                fit$coef[1],
                fit$pv[1],
                fit$bws[1,1]))
  }, error = function(e) cat(tier, "failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n"))
}

# ── 13c) Alternative bandwidth check ─────────────────────────
# Test sensitivity to bandwidth choice (h = 5m and h = 8m)
cat("\n=== Bandwidth sensitivity — Top opponent only ===\n")
top_data <- rdd_data_def %>% filter(elo_tier == "Top opponent")

for (h in c(3, 5, 8, 10)) {
  tryCatch({
    fit <- rdrobust(
      y      = as.numeric(top_data$is_tackle),
      x      = top_data$dist_signed_def,
      c      = 0,
      h      = h,
      kernel = "triangular"
    )
    cat(sprintf("h = %2dm | beta = %6.3f | p = %.3f | N: %d/%d\n",
                h, fit$coef[1], fit$pv[1],
                fit$N_h[1], fit$N_h[2]))
  }, error = function(e) cat("h =", h, "failed\n"))
}

# ── 13d) Coefficient plot — ELO gradient (main result figure) ─
coef_data <- tibble(
  tier  = factor(
    c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent"),
    levels = c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent")
  ),
  beta  = c(
    rdd_tier_def[["Top opponent"]]$coef[1],
    rdd_tier_def[["Mid opponent"]]$coef[1],
    rdd_tier_def[["Weak opponent"]]$coef[1]
  ),
  ci_lo = c(
    rdd_tier_def[["Top opponent"]]$ci[1, 1],
    rdd_tier_def[["Mid opponent"]]$ci[1, 1],
    rdd_tier_def[["Weak opponent"]]$ci[1, 1]
  ),
  ci_hi = c(
    rdd_tier_def[["Top opponent"]]$ci[1, 2],
    rdd_tier_def[["Mid opponent"]]$ci[1, 2],
    rdd_tier_def[["Weak opponent"]]$ci[1, 2]
  ),
  pval  = c(
    rdd_tier_def[["Top opponent"]]$pv[1],
    rdd_tier_def[["Mid opponent"]]$pv[1],
    rdd_tier_def[["Weak opponent"]]$pv[1]
  ),
  elo_approx = c(1750, 1580, 1430)  # approximate midpoints of ELO tiers
)

fig5 <- ggplot(coef_data,
               aes(x = tier, y = beta, colour = tier)) +

  # Zero reference line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.8) +

  # Confidence intervals
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi),
                width = 0.15, linewidth = 1.1) +

  # Point estimates
  geom_point(size = 5) +

  # Significance label
  geom_text(
    aes(label = ifelse(pval < 0.01, "p < 0.01 ***",
                ifelse(pval < 0.05, "p < 0.05 **",
                ifelse(pval < 0.10, "p < 0.10 *", "n.s.")))),
    vjust = -1.2, size = 3.8, fontface = "italic"
  ) +

  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "Top opponent"  = "#d6604d",
      "Mid opponent"  = "#f4a582",
      "Weak opponent" = "#2166ac"
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(-1.6, 0.8)
  ) +

  labs(
    title    = "The Penalty Tax: RDD Estimates by Opponent Quality",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "LATE = drop in P(Tackle) at own box boundary | ",
      "Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24\n",
      "Against elite opponents, defenders are ~118pp less likely to tackle inside the box"
    ),
    x = "Opponent Quality (ELO Tier)",
    y = "RDD Estimate: β (Change in P(Tackle) at Box Line)"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40", size = 10),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

print(fig5)
ggsave("fig5_rdd_coefficients_by_elo.png",
       plot = fig5, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# RDD Binned Scatter — faceted by ELO tier (FIXED)
# ============================================================

BIN_WIDTH <- 2.0

binned_tier <- rdd_data_def %>%
  filter(!is.na(elo_tier), elo_tier != "Unknown") %>%
  mutate(
    dist_bin = floor(dist_signed_def / BIN_WIDTH) * BIN_WIDTH + BIN_WIDTH / 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(elo_tier, dist_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    tackle_rate = mean(is_tackle, na.rm = TRUE),
    se          = sd(is_tackle,   na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n           = n(),
    inside      = first(dist_bin) < 0,
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n >= 3)

# ELO tier labels with sample sizes
tier_labels <- rdd_data_def %>%
  filter(!is.na(elo_tier), elo_tier != "Unknown") %>%
  count(elo_tier) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(elo_tier, "\n(n = ", n, " duels)"))

binned_tier <- binned_tier %>%
  left_join(tier_labels %>% select(elo_tier, label), by = "elo_tier") %>%
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = tier_labels$label))

tier_colours <- c(
  "Top opponent"  = "#d6604d",
  "Mid opponent"  = "#f4a100",
  "Weak opponent" = "#2166ac"
)

# ── Beta annotation data frame (fixed) ───────────────────────
beta_annotations <- tibble(
  elo_tier    = c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent"),
  dist_bin    = c(-11, -11, -11),
  tackle_rate = c(0.12, 0.12, 0.12),
  annotation  = c(
    "β = -1.18***\np = 0.003",
    "β = -0.09\np = 0.896",
    "β = +0.25\np = 0.766"
  )
) %>%
  left_join(tier_labels %>% select(elo_tier, label), by = "elo_tier") %>%
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = tier_labels$label))

fig_rdd_tiers <- ggplot(binned_tier,
                        aes(x = dist_bin, y = tackle_rate,
                            colour = elo_tier, fill = elo_tier)) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = tackle_rate - 1.96 * se,
                  ymax = tackle_rate + 1.96 * se),
              alpha = 0.15, colour = NA) +

  geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.9) +

  geom_smooth(data = ~ filter(.x, !inside),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_smooth(data = ~ filter(.x, inside),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "black",
             linewidth = 1.1, linetype = "dashed") +

  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.97,
           label = "Box line", hjust = 0,
           size = 3.2, fontface = "italic", colour = "grey30") +

  # ── FIXED: clean geom_text with pre-built data frame ─────
  geom_text(
    data    = beta_annotations,
    mapping = aes(x = dist_bin, y = tackle_rate, label = annotation),
    colour  = "grey20", size = 3.5,
    fontface = "italic", lineheight = 0.9,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  scale_colour_manual(values = tier_colours, guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(  values = tier_colours, guide = "none") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 6), name = "Events\nper bin") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, 1.05)
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ label, ncol = 3) +

  labs(
    title    = "The Penalty Tax: RDD by Opponent Quality",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "P(Tackle) at Leverkusen's own box boundary | ",
      "Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24 Bundesliga\n",
      "Dashed line = penalty box threshold | ",
      "Bins = 2m | Shaded = 95% CI"
    ),
    x = "Signed Distance to Own Box Line (m)\n← Inside box  |  Outside box →",
    y = "Probability of Tackle Attempt"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 15),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40", size = 10),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", colour = NA),
    legend.position  = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(fig_rdd_tiers)
ggsave("fig6_rdd_by_elo_tier.png",
       plot = fig_rdd_tiers, width = 15, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# FIXED rdplot: linear fit + more bins + tight bandwidth
# ============================================================

library(rdrobust)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)

# Helper to extract rdplot data and build ggplot manually
# This gives us full control over appearance
make_rdplot_gg <- function(data, tier_name, colour,
                            bw = 15, nbins_each = 12) {

  y <- as.numeric(data$is_tackle)
  x <- data$dist_signed_def

  # Generate rdplot with controlled parameters
  rp <- rdplot(
    y        = y,
    x        = x,
    c        = 0,
    p        = 1,          # LINEAR polynomial — no overfitting
    nbins    = c(nbins_each, nbins_each),  # equal bins each side
    x.lim    = c(-bw, bw), # restrict to relevant window
    hide     = TRUE        # don't auto-print, we'll build ggplot
  )

  # Extract binned means
  bins_df <- rp$vars_bins %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rename(x_mid = rdplot_mean_x, y_mean = rdplot_mean_y) %>%
    mutate(side = ifelse(x_mid < 0, "Inside box", "Outside box"))

  # Extract fitted lines
  lines_df <- rp$vars_poly %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rename(x_fit = rdplot_x, y_fit = rdplot_y)

  lines_left  <- lines_df %>% filter(x_fit <= 0)
  lines_right <- lines_df %>% filter(x_fit >= 0)

  # Get beta and p-value from rdrobust for annotation
  fit <- tryCatch(
    rdrobust(y = y, x = x, c = 0,
             kernel = "triangular", bwselect = "mserd"),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  beta_label <- if (!is.null(fit)) {
    p <- fit$pv[1]
    stars <- ifelse(p < 0.01, "***", ifelse(p < 0.05, "**",
                    ifelse(p < 0.10, "*", "n.s.")))
    sprintf("β = %.2f%s\np = %.3f", fit$coef[1], stars, p)
  } else { "" }

  # Build ggplot
  ggplot() +

    # Binned means
    geom_point(data = bins_df,
               aes(x = x_mid, y = y_mean),
               colour = colour, size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +

    # Linear fit — left side (inside box)
    geom_line(data = lines_left,
              aes(x = x_fit, y = y_fit),
              colour = colour, linewidth = 1.3) +

    # Linear fit — right side (outside box)
    geom_line(data = lines_right,
              aes(x = x_fit, y = y_fit),
              colour = colour, linewidth = 1.3) +

    # RDD cutoff
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "black",
               linewidth = 1.0, linetype = "solid") +

    # Beta annotation
    annotate("text",
             x = -bw * 0.85, y = 0.10,
             label = beta_label,
             hjust = 0, size = 4,
             colour = "grey20", fontface = "italic",
             lineheight = 0.9) +

    # Axis labels at cutoff
    annotate("text", x = -0.5, y = 1.02,
             label = "Inside →", hjust = 1,
             size = 3, colour = "grey50") +
    annotate("text", x =  0.5, y = 1.02,
             label = "← Outside", hjust = 0,
             size = 3, colour = "grey50") +

    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      limits = c(0, 1.08)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-bw, bw)) +

    labs(
      title    = tier_name,
      x        = "Distance to box line (m)",
      y        = "P(Tackle)"
    ) +

    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      hjust = 0.5,
                                      colour = colour,
                                      size = 13),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border     = element_rect(colour = "grey85",
                                      fill = NA)
    )
}

# ── Build one plot per tier ───────────────────────────────────
p_top  <- make_rdplot_gg(
  rdd_data_def %>% filter(elo_tier == "Top opponent"),
  "Top opponent",   "#d6604d"
)

p_mid  <- make_rdplot_gg(
  rdd_data_def %>% filter(elo_tier == "Mid opponent"),
  "Mid opponent",   "#f4a100"
)

p_weak <- make_rdplot_gg(
  rdd_data_def %>% filter(elo_tier == "Weak opponent"),
  "Weak opponent",  "#2166ac"
)

# ── Compose final figure ──────────────────────────────────────
fig_rdd_clean <- p_top + p_mid + p_weak +
  plot_layout(ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "The Penalty Tax: RDD by Opponent Quality",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "P(Tackle) at Leverkusen's own box boundary | ",
      "Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24 Bundesliga\n",
      "Linear fit each side of cutoff | ",
      "±15m window | Equal-sized bins"
    ),
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold",
                                   hjust = 0.5, size = 15),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                   colour = "grey40", size = 10)
    )
  )

print(fig_rdd_clean)
ggsave("fig6_rdd_clean.png",
       plot = fig_rdd_clean,
       width = 15, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 14: Reconstruct score state + build DiD dataset
# ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsoccer)

# ── 14a) Extract goal events from full season ─────────────────
# StatsBomb: goals are shots with outcome "Goal"
goals <- events %>%
  filter(
    type.name == "Shot",
    shot.outcome.name == "Goal",
    !is.na(minute)
  ) %>%
  select(
    match_id, period, minute, second,
    team.name, index
  ) %>%
  arrange(match_id, period, minute, second)

cat("Total goals in dataset:", nrow(goals), "\n")
cat("Sample:\n")
print(head(goals, 10))

# ── 14b) Build running score per match ────────────────────────
# For each match, compute Leverkusen's goal difference
# at the time of each event

score_timeline <- goals %>%
  group_by(match_id) %>%
  mutate(
    lev_goal  = team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
    opp_goal  = team.name != "Bayer Leverkusen",
    lev_score_after = cumsum(lev_goal),
    opp_score_after = cumsum(opp_goal),
    goal_diff_after = lev_score_after - opp_score_after,
    # Approximate time in minutes
    time_mins = minute + second / 60
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(match_id, index, time_mins, minute,
         lev_score_after, opp_score_after, goal_diff_after)

cat("\n=== Score state distribution at goal moments ===\n")
print(table(score_timeline$goal_diff_after))

# ── 14c) Join score state to pressure events ──────────────────
# Strategy: for each press event, find the most recent goal
# that occurred BEFORE it in the same match
# If no goals yet, score is 0-0

press_with_score <- press_clean %>%
  select(id, match_id, minute, second,
         location.x, location.y,
         counterpress_flag, elo_tier,
         match_date, opponent) %>%
  mutate(time_mins = minute + second / 60)

# For each press event, get the score state at that moment
# Using a rolling join approach

get_score_at_time <- function(match_events, match_goals) {
  match_events %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      # Goals scored by each team before this event
      lev_goals = sum(
        match_goals$lev_goal[match_goals$time_mins < time_mins],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      opp_goals = sum(
        match_goals$opp_goal[match_goals$time_mins < time_mins],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      goal_diff = lev_goals - opp_goals
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
}

# Apply per match
cat("\nJoining score state to press events...\n")

goals_per_match <- goals %>%
  mutate(
    lev_goal = team.name == "Bayer Leverkusen",
    opp_goal = team.name != "Bayer Leverkusen",
    time_mins = minute + second / 60
  )

press_scored <- press_with_score %>%
  group_by(match_id) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    match_goals <- goals_per_match %>%
      filter(match_id == .y$match_id)

    if (nrow(match_goals) == 0) {
      # No goals in match — score always 0-0
      .x %>% mutate(lev_goals = 0, opp_goals = 0, goal_diff = 0)
    } else {
      .x %>% rowwise() %>%
        mutate(
          lev_goals = sum(
            match_goals$lev_goal[match_goals$time_mins < time_mins],
            na.rm = TRUE
          ),
          opp_goals = sum(
            match_goals$opp_goal[match_goals$time_mins < time_mins],
            na.rm = TRUE
          ),
          goal_diff = lev_goals - opp_goals
        ) %>%
        ungroup()
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("Press events with score state:", nrow(press_scored), "\n")

# ── 14d) Build DiD variables ──────────────────────────────────
LATE_THRESHOLD <- 70  # minutes

press_did <- press_scored %>%
  mutate(
    # Score state
    score_state = case_when(
      goal_diff > 0  ~ "Winning",
      goal_diff == 0 ~ "Drawing",
      goal_diff < 0  ~ "Losing"
    ),
    is_losing = goal_diff < 0,

    # Time period
    is_late   = minute > LATE_THRESHOLD,

    # DiD treatment indicator
    # Treatment = losing AND late (comeback mode)
    comeback_mode = is_losing & is_late,

    # DiD group labels for plotting
    did_group = case_when(
      is_losing  & is_late  ~ "Losing — Late (>70')\n[Treatment]",
      is_losing  & !is_late ~ "Losing — Early (≤70')\n[Control]",
      !is_losing & is_late  ~ "Not Losing — Late (>70')\n[Control]",
      TRUE                  ~ "Not Losing — Early (≤70')\n[Control]"
    )
  )

# ── 14e) Summary table ────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n=== DiD Cell Counts ===\n")
did_summary <- press_did %>%
  group_by(is_late, is_losing) %>%
  summarise(
    n_presses        = n(),
    mean_location_x  = round(mean(location.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    sd_location_x    = round(sd(location.x,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    cp_rate          = round(mean(counterpress_flag) * 100, 1),
    .groups          = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    period    = ifelse(is_late,   "Late (>70')", "Early (≤70')"),
    score     = ifelse(is_losing, "Losing",      "Not Losing")
  ) %>%
  select(score, period, n_presses, mean_location_x,
         sd_location_x, cp_rate)

print(did_summary)

# ── 14f) Naive DiD estimate (before regression) ───────────────
cat("\n=== Naive DiD Calculation ===\n")

cell_means <- press_did %>%
  group_by(is_late, is_losing) %>%
  summarise(mean_x = mean(location.x, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# Extract cells
early_losing     <- cell_means %>%
  filter(!is_late,  is_losing)  %>% pull(mean_x)
late_losing      <- cell_means %>%
  filter( is_late,  is_losing)  %>% pull(mean_x)
early_notlosing  <- cell_means %>%
  filter(!is_late, !is_losing)  %>% pull(mean_x)
late_notlosing   <- cell_means %>%
  filter( is_late, !is_losing)  %>% pull(mean_x)

diff_losing     <- late_losing    - early_losing
diff_notlosing  <- late_notlosing - early_notlosing
did_estimate    <- diff_losing    - diff_notlosing

cat(sprintf(
  "Early Losing:       %.2f m\n
Late Losing:        %.2f m\n
Δ Losing:           %.2f m\n\n
Early Not Losing:   %.2f m\n
Late Not Losing:    %.2f m\n
Δ Not Losing:       %.2f m\n\n
DiD Estimate:       %.2f m  ← the comeback shift\n",
  early_losing, late_losing, diff_losing,
  early_notlosing, late_notlosing, diff_notlosing,
  did_estimate
))
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# CHUNK 15: Formal DiD regression + ELO interaction
# ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)

# ── 15a) Baseline DiD regression ─────────────────────────────
# Y = location.x (press height)
# Model: Y = α + β1·IsLate + β2·IsLosing + β3·(IsLate×IsLosing) + ε
# β3 is the DiD estimator — the comeback shift

model_base <- lm(
  location.x ~ is_late + is_losing + is_late:is_losing,
  data = press_did
)

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("MODEL 1: Baseline DiD — Press Height\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")
summary(model_base)

# Clean coefficient table
tidy(model_base, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))) %>%
  print()

# ── 15b) DiD with ELO interaction ────────────────────────────
# Does the comeback shift intensify against stronger opponents?
# Y = α + β1·IsLate + β2·IsLosing + β3·(IsLate×IsLosing)
#       + β4·ELOtier + β5·(IsLate×IsLosing×ELOtier) + ε

press_did_elo <- press_did %>%
  filter(!is.na(elo_tier), elo_tier != "Unknown") %>%
  mutate(
    elo_tier = relevel(factor(elo_tier),
                       ref = "Weak opponent")  # weak = baseline
  )

model_elo <- lm(
  location.x ~ is_late * is_losing * elo_tier,
  data = press_did_elo
)

cat("\n=======================================================\n")
cat("MODEL 2: DiD × ELO Tier Interaction\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")
summary(model_elo)

# ── 15c) Predicted means per cell × tier ─────────────────────
cat("\n=== Predicted press height by DiD cell × ELO tier ===\n")
pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  is_late   = c(FALSE, TRUE),
  is_losing = c(FALSE, TRUE),
  elo_tier  = c("Top opponent", "Mid opponent", "Weak opponent")
) %>%
  mutate(pred_x = predict(model_elo, newdata = .))

pred_grid %>%
  mutate(
    period = ifelse(is_late,   "Late >70'", "Early ≤70'"),
    score  = ifelse(is_losing, "Losing",    "Not Losing")
  ) %>%
  select(elo_tier, score, period, pred_x) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from  = period,
                     values_from = pred_x) %>%
  mutate(
    did_shift = round(`Late >70'` - `Early ≤70'`, 2),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))
  ) %>%
  arrange(elo_tier, score) %>%
  print()

# ── 15d) DiD estimate per ELO tier (manual) ──────────────────
cat("\n=== DiD Estimate by ELO Tier ===\n")
did_by_tier <- press_did_elo %>%
  group_by(elo_tier, is_late, is_losing) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_x = mean(location.x, na.rm = TRUE),
    n      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(is_late, is_losing),
    values_from = c(mean_x, n),
    names_sep   = "_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # DiD = (Late,Losing - Early,Losing) - (Late,NotLosing - Early,NotLosing)
    diff_losing    = mean_x_TRUE_TRUE  - mean_x_FALSE_TRUE,
    diff_notlosing = mean_x_TRUE_FALSE - mean_x_FALSE_FALSE,
    did_estimate   = round(diff_losing - diff_notlosing, 2),
    diff_losing    = round(diff_losing, 2),
    diff_notlosing = round(diff_notlosing, 2)
  ) %>%
  select(elo_tier, diff_losing, diff_notlosing, did_estimate,
         n_TRUE_TRUE, n_FALSE_TRUE)

colnames(did_by_tier) <- c(
  "ELO Tier", "Δ Losing", "Δ Not Losing",
  "DiD Estimate (m)", "n (Late+Losing)", "n (Early+Losing)"
)
print(did_by_tier)

# ── 15e) Visualization: parallel trends + DiD shift ──────────
plot_did <- press_did_elo %>%
  group_by(elo_tier, is_late, is_losing) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_x = mean(location.x, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_x   = sd(location.x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    period    = ifelse(is_late,   "Late\n(>70')", "Early\n(≤70')"),
    score     = ifelse(is_losing, "Losing",       "Not Losing"),
    period_n  = ifelse(is_late, 1, 0)
  )

tier_colours <- c(
  "Top opponent"  = "#d6604d",
  "Mid opponent"  = "#f4a100",
  "Weak opponent" = "#2166ac"
)

fig_did <- ggplot(
  plot_did,
  aes(x      = period_n,
      y      = mean_x,
      colour = score,
      group  = score)
) +

  # Connecting lines
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Points with error bars
  geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_x - 1.96 * se_x,
        ymax = mean_x + 1.96 * se_x),
    width = 0.05, linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  # DiD annotation arrow — only on Late side
  geom_segment(
    data = plot_did %>%
      filter(is_late) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(
        id_cols     = c(elo_tier),
        names_from  = is_losing,
        values_from = mean_x
      ) %>%
      rename(losing = `TRUE`, notlosing = `FALSE`),
    aes(x = 1.08, xend = 1.08,
        y = notlosing, yend = losing),
    colour    = "grey30",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    arrow     = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
                      ends = "both", type = "closed"),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  geom_text(
    data = plot_did %>%
      filter(is_late) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(
        id_cols     = c(elo_tier),
        names_from  = is_losing,
        values_from = mean_x
      ) %>%
      rename(losing = `TRUE`, notlosing = `FALSE`) %>%
      left_join(
        did_by_tier %>%
          rename(elo_tier = `ELO Tier`,
                 did_est  = `DiD Estimate (m)`),
        by = "elo_tier"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        mid_y = (losing + notlosing) / 2,
        label = paste0("DiD = +", did_est, "m")
      ),
    aes(x = 1.12, y = mid_y, label = label),
    hjust       = 0, size = 3.5,
    colour      = "grey20",
    fontface    = "italic",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Losing"     = "#d6604d",
               "Not Losing" = "#2166ac"),
    name   = "Score state"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(3, 7), name = "n events") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Early (≤70')", "Late (>70')"),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0.1, 0.3))
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ elo_tier, ncol = 3) +

  labs(
    title    = "The Comeback Shift: DiD by Opponent Quality",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Average press height (location.x) by score state × time period\n",
      "Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24 | DiD = (Losing Late − Losing Early) ",
      "− (Not Losing Late − Not Losing Early)"
    ),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Average Press Height (m from own goal)"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
```
