```{r}
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold",
                                    hjust = 0.5, size = 15),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                    colour = "grey40", size = 10),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", colour = NA),
    legend.position  = "top",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(fig_did)
ggsave("fig7_did_comeback_shift.png",
       plot   = fig_did,
       width  = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# DiD VISUALIZATION SUITE — 4 complementary figures
# ============================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggsoccer)
library(patchwork)
library(ggridges)   # install.packages("ggridges") if needed

# ── Shared theme ─────────────────────────────────────────────
theme_paper <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40", size = 10),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.position  = "top"
    )
}

# ── Colour palette ────────────────────────────────────────────
col_losing    <- "#d6604d"
col_notlosing <- "#2166ac"
col_late      <- "#1a1a2e"
col_early     <- "#9e9e9e"

# ============================================================
# FIGURE A: Pitch map — press locations in 4 DiD cells
# Shows WHERE on the pitch the comeback shift happens
# ============================================================

fig_A <- press_did %>%
  filter(!is.na(is_late), !is.na(is_losing)) %>%
  mutate(
    did_group = case_when(
      !is_losing & !is_late ~ "Not Losing — Early (≤70')",
      !is_losing &  is_late ~ "Not Losing — Late (>70')",
       is_losing & !is_late ~ "Losing — Early (≤70')",
       is_losing &  is_late ~ "Losing — Late (>70') ★"
    ),
    did_group = factor(did_group, levels = c(
      "Not Losing — Early (≤70')",
      "Not Losing — Late (>70')",
      "Losing — Early (≤70')",
      "Losing — Late (>70') ★"
    ))
  ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(x = location.x, y = location.y,
        fill = after_stat(ndensity)),
    geom = "raster", contour = FALSE,
    n = 150, h = c(15, 15)
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "white", mid = "#fdae61", high = "#d73027",
    midpoint = 0.4,
    name = "Relative\nDensity", limits = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  # Pitch boundary masks
  annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf, xmax=Inf, ymin=-Inf, ymax=0,   fill="white", color=NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf, xmax=Inf, ymin=80,   ymax=Inf, fill="white", color=NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=-Inf, xmax=0,   ymin=-Inf, ymax=Inf, fill="white", color=NA) +
  annotate("rect", xmin=120,  xmax=Inf, ymin=-Inf, ymax=Inf, fill="white", color=NA) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_statsbomb,
                 colour = "grey40", fill = NA) +
  # Vertical line showing mean press height per cell
  geom_vline(
    data = press_did %>%
      filter(!is.na(is_late), !is.na(is_losing)) %>%
      mutate(did_group = case_when(
        !is_losing & !is_late ~ "Not Losing — Early (≤70')",
        !is_losing &  is_late ~ "Not Losing — Late (>70')",
         is_losing & !is_late ~ "Losing — Early (≤70')",
         is_losing &  is_late ~ "Losing — Late (>70') ★"
      ),
      did_group = factor(did_group, levels = c(
        "Not Losing — Early (≤70')",
        "Not Losing — Late (>70')",
        "Losing — Early (≤70')",
        "Losing — Late (>70') ★"
      ))) %>%
      group_by(did_group) %>%
      summarise(mean_x = mean(location.x), .groups = "drop"),
    aes(xintercept = mean_x),
    colour = col_late, linewidth = 1.0,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-2, 122), ylim = c(-3, 83), expand = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ did_group, ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title    = "A) Press Location Density Across DiD Cells",
    subtitle = "Dashed line = mean press height per cell | ★ = Treatment group"
  ) +
  theme_pitch() +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", colour = NA),
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 13),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey40", size = 9),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.position  = "right"
  )

# ============================================================
# FIGURE B: Ridge plot — distribution of press height
# Shows the full DISTRIBUTION shift, not just means
# ============================================================

fig_B <- press_did %>%
  filter(!is.na(is_late), !is.na(is_losing)) %>%
  mutate(
    group_label = case_when(
      !is_losing & !is_late ~ "Not Losing\nEarly (≤70')",
      !is_losing &  is_late ~ "Not Losing\nLate (>70')",
       is_losing & !is_late ~ "Losing\nEarly (≤70')",
       is_losing &  is_late ~ "Losing\nLate (>70') ★"
    ),
    group_label = factor(group_label, levels = c(
      "Not Losing\nEarly (≤70')",
      "Not Losing\nLate (>70')",
      "Losing\nEarly (≤70')",
      "Losing\nLate (>70') ★"
    )),
    is_treatment = is_losing & is_late
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x     = location.x,
             y     = group_label,
             fill  = is_treatment,
             colour = is_treatment)) +
  geom_density_ridges(
    alpha = 0.65, scale = 1.2,
    quantile_lines = TRUE, quantiles = 2,  # median line
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  # Vertical reference lines: thirds
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(40, 80, 102),
             linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 20,  y = 0.4, label = "Defensive\nThird",
           size = 3, colour = "grey50", hjust = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 60,  y = 0.4, label = "Middle\nThird",
           size = 3, colour = "grey50", hjust = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 91,  y = 0.4, label = "Att.\nThird",
           size = 3, colour = "grey50", hjust = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 111, y = 0.4, label = "Box",
           size = 3, colour = "grey50", hjust = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = col_notlosing, "TRUE" = col_losing),
    labels = c("Control groups", "Treatment: Losing Late ★"),
    name   = ""
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = col_notlosing, "TRUE" = col_losing),
    guide  = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 40, 80, 102, 120),
    labels = c("0", "40m", "80m", "102m\n(box)", "120m")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "B) Distribution of Press Height by DiD Group",
    subtitle = "Vertical line = median | Treatment group shifts right = higher press",
    x        = "Press Location (m from own goal line)",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  theme_paper()

# ============================================================
# FIGURE C: Minute-by-minute press height
# Shows the TEMPORAL dynamics of the comeback shift
# ============================================================

press_timeline <- press_did %>%
  filter(!is.na(is_losing), minute <= 95) %>%
  mutate(
    minute_bin = floor(minute / 5) * 5 + 2.5,  # 5-min bins
    score_label = ifelse(is_losing, "Losing", "Not Losing")
  ) %>%
  group_by(minute_bin, score_label) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_x = mean(location.x, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_x   = sd(location.x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n >= 5)

fig_C <- ggplot(press_timeline,
                aes(x      = minute_bin,
                    y      = mean_x,
                    colour = score_label,
                    fill   = score_label)) +

  # Confidence ribbon
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_x - 1.96 * se_x,
                  ymax = mean_x + 1.96 * se_x),
              alpha = 0.15, colour = NA) +

  # Smoothed trend
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.4,
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.4) +

  # Raw bin means
  geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.6) +

  # DiD treatment window
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 70, xmax = 95,
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "gold", alpha = 0.08) +
  annotate("text", x = 82.5, y = 105,
           label = "Treatment\nwindow",
           size = 3.2, colour = "grey40",
           fontface = "italic", hjust = 0.5) +

  # Half time
  geom_vline(xintercept = 45, colour = "grey60",
             linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 45.5, y = 105,
           label = "HT", size = 3,
           colour = "grey50", hjust = 0) +

  # 70' threshold
  geom_vline(xintercept = 70, colour = "grey40",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 70.5, y = 105,
           label = "70'", size = 3,
           colour = "grey40", hjust = 0) +

  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Losing"     = col_losing,
               "Not Losing" = col_notlosing),
    name   = "Score state"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Losing"     = col_losing,
               "Not Losing" = col_notlosing),
    guide  = "none"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1.5, 4), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 95, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(40, 110)) +

  labs(
    title    = "C) Press Height Trajectory Through the Match",
    subtitle = "5-minute bins | LOESS smooth | Shaded = treatment window (losing after 70')",
    x        = "Match Minute",
    y        = "Mean Press Height (m)"
  ) +
  theme_paper()

# ============================================================
# FIGURE D: DiD coefficient plot with raw cell means
# The formal econometric summary visual
# ============================================================

# Cell means with CI
cell_means_ci <- press_did %>%
  filter(!is.na(is_late), !is.na(is_losing)) %>%
  group_by(is_late, is_losing) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_x = mean(location.x, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_x   = sd(location.x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    period     = ifelse(is_late, "Late\n(>70')", "Early\n(≤70')"),
    period_n   = ifelse(is_late, 1, 0),
    score      = ifelse(is_losing, "Losing", "Not Losing"),
    ci_lo      = mean_x - 1.96 * se_x,
    ci_hi      = mean_x + 1.96 * se_x
  )

# DiD bracket data
did_bracket <- cell_means_ci %>%
  filter(is_late) %>%
  select(is_losing, mean_x, score) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = is_losing,
                     values_from = c(mean_x, score)) %>%
  mutate(
    mid_y = (mean_x_TRUE + mean_x_FALSE) / 2,
    did_label = sprintf("DiD = +%.1fm\n(p = 0.104)", 6.17)
  )

fig_D <- ggplot(cell_means_ci,
                aes(x      = period_n,
                    y      = mean_x,
                    colour = score,
                    group  = score)) +

  # Lines connecting periods
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.4, alpha = 0.9) +

  # Points
  geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 1) +

  # Error bars
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi),
    width = 0.04, linewidth = 0.9
  ) +

  # Sample size labels
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("n=", scales::comma(n))),
    vjust = -1.5, size = 3, colour = "grey50"
  ) +

  # DiD bracket
  annotate("segment",
           x = 1.12, xend = 1.12,
           y = did_bracket$mean_x_FALSE,
           yend = did_bracket$mean_x_TRUE,
           colour = "grey20", linewidth = 1.0,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"),
                         ends = "both", type = "closed")) +
  annotate("text",
           x = 1.17, y = (did_bracket$mean_x_FALSE +
                          did_bracket$mean_x_TRUE) / 2,
           label = did_bracket$did_label,
           hjust = 0, size = 3.8,
           colour = "grey20", fontface = "bold",
           lineheight = 0.9) +

  # Counterfactual dashed line
  geom_segment(
    data = cell_means_ci %>%
      filter(!is_late, is_losing) %>%
      left_join(
        cell_means_ci %>%
          filter(!is_late, !is_losing) %>%
          mutate(slope = (
            cell_means_ci$mean_x[cell_means_ci$is_late &
                                  !cell_means_ci$is_losing] -
            cell_means_ci$mean_x[!cell_means_ci$is_late &
                                  !cell_means_ci$is_losing]
          )) %>%
          select(slope),
        by = character()
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        x1 = 0, y1 = mean_x,
        x2 = 1, y2 = mean_x + slope
      ),
    aes(x = x1, y = y1, xend = x2, yend = y2),
    colour    = col_losing, linewidth = 0.9,
    linetype  = "dashed", alpha = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 71.5,
           label = "Counterfactual\n(parallel trend)",
           size = 3, colour = col_losing,
           alpha = 0.7, fontface = "italic") +

  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Losing"     = col_losing,
               "Not Losing" = col_notlosing),
    name   = "Score state"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(4, 9), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Early (≤70')", "Late (>70')"),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0.15, 0.4))
  ) +

  labs(
    title    = "D) DiD Estimator: The Comeback Shift",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "β₃ = +6.17m (p = 0.104) | ",
      "Dashed = parallel trends counterfactual\n",
      "Treatment effect = gap between red dot and dashed line at Late"
    ),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean Press Height (m from own goal)"
  ) +
  theme_paper()

# ============================================================
# COMPOSE: Full 4-panel figure for the paper
# ============================================================

fig_did_full <- (fig_A) /
  (fig_B | fig_C | fig_D) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title   = "The Comeback Shift: Spatial Evidence of Leverkusen's Never-Say-Die Identity",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Difference-in-Differences design: Treatment = Losing after 70' | ",
      "Outcome = Press height (location.x) | Bayer Leverkusen 2023/24 Bundesliga"
    ),
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold",
                                   hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                   colour = "grey40", size = 11),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
  )

print(fig_did_full)
ggsave("fig_did_full.png",
       plot   = fig_did_full,
       width  = 18, height = 14,
       dpi    = 300)

# ── Also save individual panels for flexible paper layout ────
ggsave("fig_did_A_pitchmap.png",  fig_A, width = 18, height = 5,  dpi = 300)
ggsave("fig_did_B_ridges.png",    fig_B, width = 9,  height = 6,  dpi = 300)
ggsave("fig_did_C_timeline.png",  fig_C, width = 9,  height = 6,  dpi = 300)
ggsave("fig_did_D_estimator.png", fig_D, width = 8,  height = 6,  dpi = 300)

```
